user.title: Skylight
user.description: How do you want to authenticate? A refresh token keeps working indefinitely (it auto-renews); an access token is quick but expires in about 2 hours.

refresh.title: Skylight refresh token
refresh.description: Paste your Skylight refresh token. To get it: sign in at ourskylight.com in a browser, open DevTools → Application → Local Storage → ourskylight.com, find the key `mmkv.default\auth-storage`, and copy `state.refreshToken`. It's stored only in Home Assistant and auto-renews (rotates) on each use.

token.title: Skylight access token
token.description: Paste a Bearer access token (`state.accessToken` from the same place as above). This expires in ~2 hours and will not auto-renew — use the refresh-token method for a permanent setup.

frame.title: Choose a frame
frame.description: Select which Skylight frame (calendar) to add.

error.invalid_auth: Token was rejected. Capture a fresh one and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Skylight. Check your connection and try again.

abort.no_frames: No frames were found on this account.
